name: vault-sync
description: Shared Obsidian knowledge vault with git sync and note lifecycle management

hooks.prompt: You must respond with valid JSON only. Consider the work just completed. If it involved a significant architectural decision, new convention or pattern discovery, or notable debugging breakthrough, respond: {"ok": false, "reason": "Vault suggestion: <claim-style title> — save with /vault-note? (y/n)"}. If the work was routine, respond: {"ok": true}. Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text.

Check if the current project branch is main. If so, call vault-query with status=exploratory to find notes from recently merged branches. If any exist, tell the user: 'Found N exploratory notes from recently merged branches. Run /promote-to-vault to review.'
